subject: Playwright MCP
independent_registry_or_security_surface: NVD detail record; OSV vulnerability record; GitLab Advisory Database page; vendor release v0.0.40
negative_or_missing_surface: No canonical AVID incident ID found in the local package
reviewer_safe_reading: Playwright MCP is no longer just one NVD-plus-release-note row in the local package: it now has multi-registry public corroboration plus vendor release-note remediation visibility, but still no exact AVID or ATLAS same-case interoperability.
threshold_delta_now: Strong independent-attachment condition for Playwright is now satisfied at the public-registry corroboration layer without changing the row's appendix role or release-note-qualified caution.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Pursue an exact ATLAS same-case join only if one canonical mapping appears; otherwise use the stronger independent-registry cluster as the safe trust-boundary evidence layer.

subject: ToolHive
independent_registry_or_security_surface: GitHub Security Advisory API entry; NVD JSON API record; OSV vulnerability record; AVID report; vendor release v0.0.33
negative_or_missing_surface: No GitLab Advisory Database page found at the checked pypi/toolhive path
reviewer_safe_reading: ToolHive already had stronger public corroboration than Playwright because the row combines upstream advisory, NVD, OSV, vendor release metadata, and an exact AVID incident ID, but it still lacks an exact ATLAS same-case link.
threshold_delta_now: This row remains the stronger of the two seeded MCP/deployment-trust exemplars on external interoperability, while the family-level remaining blocker is breadth beyond MCP-specific cases rather than another basic corroboration pass.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Pursue an exact ATLAS same-case join if one canonical mapping appears; otherwise keep the home-folder-access precondition explicit and prefer a non-MCP event-grade trust-boundary row for the next family-level threshold gain.

subject: Playwright MCP + ToolHive
independent_registry_or_security_surface: Playwright now has NVD+OSV+GLAD corroboration; ToolHive has GHSA+NVD+OSV+AVID corroboration
negative_or_missing_surface: Pair still lacks a non-MCP trust-boundary peer and any exact ATLAS same-case join
reviewer_safe_reading: The seeded MCP/deployment-trust slice is no longer weak because of missing public corroboration; it is now weak because it remains MCP-specific and still lacks exact ATLAS same-case interoperability.
threshold_delta_now: Route SEC-NRB-004 narrows: the independent-attachment branch is materially stronger now, so the next family-level threshold event is a non-MCP supply-chain or dependency-trust case, or an exact ATLAS same-case join for one seeded MCP row.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Count the next trust-boundary progress only if one event-grade non-MCP row lands or one exact ATLAS same-case join appears for Playwright MCP or ToolHive.
